headline: OWASP Top 10
description: The OWASP Top 10 is the de facto standard for web application security awareness, listing the ten most critical security risks. Updated periodically (last: 2021), it guides security testing, code review, and developer education worldwide. The 2021 edition shifted from vulnerability categories to risk-based categories.

citation.name: Web Application Security: OWASP Top 10 and Beyond (2025 Edition)
citation.author: multiple
